act1-den-of-evil.name: Den of Evil
act1-den-of-evil.desc: Cleanse the Den of Evil near the Rogue Encampment.
act1-den-of-evil.obj1: Slay all monsters in the Den

act1-sisters-burial.name: Sisters' Burial Grounds
act1-sisters-burial.desc: Lay Blood Raven's spirit to rest.

act1-search-for-cain.name: The Search for Cain
act1-search-for-cain.desc: Travel to Tristram to rescue Deckard Cain.

act1-forgotten-tower.name: The Forgotten Tower
act1-forgotten-tower.desc: Explore the Forgotten Tower in the Stony Field and defeat the Countess.

act1-tools-of-the-trade.name: Tools of the Trade
act1-tools-of-the-trade.desc: Return Charsi's Horadric Malus to her.

act1-andariel.name: Bounty: Andariel
act1-andariel.desc: Defeat Andariel in the corrupted Monastery.

act1-charsis-imbue.name: Charsi's Imbue
act1-charsis-imbue.desc: After recovering the Horadric Malus, Charsi can imbue a single normal item with rare power.
act1-charsis-imbue.obj1: Hand a normal item to Charsi.

act1-rogue-merc-unlock.name: Kashya's Recruit
act1-rogue-merc-unlock.desc: After avenging the Sisters at the Burial Grounds, Kashya offers a Rogue Scout as a mercenary.
act1-rogue-merc-unlock.obj1: Hire a Rogue Scout from Kashya.

act1-cains-favor.name: Cain's Gratitude
act1-cains-favor.desc: For freeing him from Tristram, Cain will identify your unidentified items free of charge.
act1-cains-favor.obj1: Speak with Cain in the Rogue Encampment.

act1-gheeds-gamble.name: Gheed's Gamble
act1-gheeds-gamble.desc: Spend gold at Gheed's gambling stall five times for a guaranteed magical item chance.

act1-pandemonium-cow-rumor.name: Whispers of the Cow King
act1-pandemonium-cow-rumor.desc: Transmute Wirt's Leg with a Tome of Town Portal in the Horadric Cube to open a moo-ving portal.
act1-pandemonium-cow-rumor.obj2: Open the Secret Cow Level portal.

act2-radaments-lair.name: Radament's Lair
act2-radaments-lair.desc: Descend into the sewers and defeat Radament.

act2-horadric-staff.name: The Horadric Staff
act2-horadric-staff.desc: Collect the parts of the Horadric Staff and combine them.

act2-tainted-sun.name: The Tainted Sun
act2-tainted-sun.desc: Slay the Claw Viper priests and restore the sun.

act2-arcane-sanctuary.name: The Arcane Sanctuary
act2-arcane-sanctuary.desc: Find the location of Tal Rasha's tomb in Baal's old sanctuary.

act2-summoner.name: The Summoner
act2-summoner.desc: Defeat the corrupted Horadrim known as The Summoner.

act2-duriel.name: Bounty: Duriel
act2-duriel.desc: Defeat Duriel inside the Tomb of Tal Rasha.

act3-golden-bird.name: The Golden Bird
act3-golden-bird.desc: Return the Golden Bird statue to Akara.

act3-blade-of-old-religion.name: Blade of the Old Religion
act3-blade-of-old-religion.desc: Recover the Gidbinn from the Flayer Jungle.

act3-khalims-will.name: Khalim's Will
act3-khalims-will.desc: Combine Khalim's Eye, Heart, Brain, and Flail into Khalim's Will.

act3-mephisto.name: Bounty: Mephisto
act3-mephisto.desc: Descend into the Durance of Hate and defeat Mephisto.

act4-fallen-angel.name: The Fallen Angel
act4-fallen-angel.desc: Defeat the fallen angel Izual on the Plains of Despair.

act4-hells-forge.name: Hell's Forge
act4-hells-forge.desc: Smash Mephisto's soulstone on Hell's Forge.

act4-terrors-end.name: Terror's End
act4-terrors-end.desc: Defeat Diablo in the Chaos Sanctuary.

act5-siege.name: Siege on Harrogath
act5-siege.desc: Repel the demonic siege of Harrogath.

act5-rescue-anya.name: Rescue on Mount Arreat
act5-rescue-anya.desc: Free Anya from her icy prison in the Frigid Highlands.

act5-prison-of-ice.name: Prison of Ice
act5-prison-of-ice.desc: Break the curse of ice from Anya.

act5-rite-of-passage.name: Rite of Passage
act5-rite-of-passage.desc: Defeat the three Ancients atop Mount Arreat.

act5-eve-of-destruction.name: Eve of Destruction
act5-eve-of-destruction.desc: Defeat Baal at the Throne of Destruction.

feedback.inProgress: Quest in progress. Complete the objectives before claiming rewards.
feedback.completed: Quest completed. Rewards can be claimed.

claim.not-completed: Complete the quest before claiming rewards.
claim.no-rewards: This quest has no rewards to claim.

denOfEvil.name: Den of Evil
denOfEvil.desc: Cleanse the nearby Den of Evil.
denOfEvil.obj1: Slay all monsters in the Den

charsi.name: Tools of the Trade
charsi.desc: Return Charsi's tools to unlock imbue.
